imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Convert the uploaded logo to a clean circular PNG with transparent background, preserving the TG fire design and 'TOPPER IGNITE' text (download-1.webp > topper-ignite-logo.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Use the same Topper Ignite logo image in the Footer component's brand logo area, replacing any existing placeholder or SVG logo there.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a logo to the project

Save the uploaded Topper Ignite logo (download-1.webp) as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.png and use it as the logo image in the Navbar component, replacing any existing placeholder or SVG logo.
